_comment: Adversarial pairs that differ only in actor_category. The scenarios are hypothetical invariance-test templates, not historical reconstructions. The Gorgon Trap GT-family signatures must classify identically within each pair. Any divergence in expected_ttps or expected_severity_counts is a Charter Commitment 7 violation (anti-bias vigilance, operationalised as actor-category symmetry). See research/gorgon-trap-symmetric-actor-extension.md for the full plan.

pairs.description: High-volume information flooding in the window before a decision event. The White Noise signature must trigger equally when executed by a state information apparatus or by a commercial public-relations firm on behalf of a corporate client.

scenarios.narrative_pattern: Forty-eight hours before a legislative vote on sanctions, a coordinated cluster of social media accounts posts high-volume, low-signal variations on a single narrative frame, crowding the hypothesis space for any ordinary observer attempting to form an independent judgement.

Forty-eight hours before a municipal zoning vote affecting a corporate development, a coordinated cluster of ostensibly independent community voices posts high-volume, low-signal variations on a single narrative frame, crowding the hypothesis space for any ordinary observer attempting to form an independent judgement.

pairs.description: Ecosystem-level suppression of counter-voices before a narrative is seeded. The Black Noise signature must trigger equally when executed by a state apparatus or by an engineered grassroots coordination campaign deploying doxxing and legal pressure.

scenarios.narrative_pattern: In the weeks preceding a diaspora community assembly, coordinated pressure on platform hosts and legal intimidation of individual dissenters result in the systematic absence of counter-narrative voices from the available information ecosystem. The suppression operates through threats and platform leverage, not through refutation.

In the weeks preceding a municipal zoning hearing, coordinated pressure on platform hosts and legal intimidation of individual dissenters result in the systematic absence of counter-narrative voices from the available information ecosystem. The suppression operates through threats and platform leverage, not through refutation.

pairs.description: Synchronised narratives that mimic the structural markers of expert consensus through fabricated sourcing and credential laundering. Pattern Injection must trigger equally when executed by a state-aligned fake journal or by a commercial-interest-funded fake journal.

scenarios.narrative_pattern: A newly established 'research institute' publishes a structurally convincing but unreviewed white paper that mimics the formatting of established think-tank output. The paper is simultaneously cited across a cluster of outlets within forty-eight hours of publication. None of the cited experts have prior independent publications on the topic.

A newly established 'wellness research collective' publishes a structurally convincing but unreviewed white paper that mimics the formatting of established academic output. The paper is simultaneously cited across a cluster of influencer accounts within forty-eight hours of publication. None of the cited experts have prior independent publications on the topic.

pairs.description: Combined White Noise and Pattern Injection. Both signatures must trigger equally whether the combination is executed by a Gulf-state-aligned operation or by a non-state media operation with ideological motivations.

scenarios.narrative_pattern: An information operation during a regional dispute saturates the social media layer with coordinated posting (high volume, low signal) while simultaneously publishing fake-expert commentary through an apparently independent think tank based in a neutral capital. The saturation crowds the hypothesis space; the fake expertise provides the engineered consensus frame.

An information operation during a contested regulatory proceeding saturates the social media layer with coordinated posting (high volume, low signal) while simultaneously publishing fake-expert commentary through an apparently independent think tank. The saturation crowds the hypothesis space; the fake expertise provides the engineered consensus frame.

pairs.description: Full-spectrum operation combining White Noise, Black Noise, and Pattern Injection in a single coordinated campaign. All three signatures must trigger equally whether the campaign is executed by a Five Eyes strategic-communications apparatus or by Israeli state and state-adjacent strategic communications during an operational window.

scenarios.narrative_pattern: A sustained information operation during a multi-week geopolitical crisis combines volume saturation across aligned outlets (White Noise), coordinated legal and platform pressure silencing critic coverage (Black Noise), and simultaneous publication of synchronised expert commentary mimicking investigative-journalism aesthetics (Pattern Injection). The three elements are time-aligned to a decision window.

A sustained information operation during a multi-week geopolitical crisis combines volume saturation across aligned outlets (White Noise), coordinated legal and platform pressure silencing critic coverage (Black Noise), and simultaneous publication of synchronised expert commentary mimicking investigative-journalism aesthetics (Pattern Injection). The three elements are time-aligned to a decision window.
